description: Canonical Measurement.type tokens for body composition (SPEC §4.1/§4.5, OB-13). `body_mass` is the canonical spelling (OB-13) — it resolves a real collision found while scoping this registry: the project's own conformance suite had independently used `body_weight`, `body_mass`, and `body.mass` for the same concept across three different vectors before this file existed. `body_mass` was chosen to match the dominant existing-platform convention (HealthKit's `bodyMass`) and because "mass" is the technically precise term ("weight" is a force, not what a bathroom scale reports in kg). `body_weight`/`body.mass` are listed as aliases so producers using either spelling are recognized, though the canonical token should be preferred going forward.

tokens.label: Body Mass Index
tokens.description: Dimensionless (kg/m² by definition, but the value itself is unitless).
